name: Transferee Preliminary Examination of Books

eligibility.description: Transferees who are petitioners before the Tax Court for the redetermination of liability in respect of the tax imposed upon the original taxpayer.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A transferee can apply for a preliminary examination of the transferor's books and records. This allows the transferee to find evidence to dispute the underlying tax liability of the transferor, potentially eliminating the debt entirely.
